bugs.error_message: Live assets shown as 1 on dashboard but 0 in stored result; downstream engines (tech/crawler/etc) produced nothing.
bugs.root_cause: Store._merge only filled EMPTY scalar fields, so re-adding an Asset with status='live' could not overwrite the existing status='candidate' (non-empty). Status transitions were silently dropped, so assets(status='live') returned empty for every engine after validation.
bugs.fix: Special-cased the 'status' field in Store._merge with a priority map (candidate<dead<live); the higher-priority status now wins on merge.
